Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process begins with Receive Application RA then Validate Form VF then Assess Eligibility AE Possibly missing info and re validation loops

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The given event log shows that case 1 after AE there is a Request Missing Info RMI then Validate Form VF again before Approval Decision AD then Send Confirmation SC Archive Case AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So there is a loop after AE sometimes you need to request missing info and re validate loop After that we have AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 2 after AE goes straight to AD then SC AC No missing info

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 3 after AE we have two RMI events consecutively then Validate Form VF then AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So there may be loop that can iterate multiple times each iteration can request missing info and then validate again Or loop may consist of RMI VF repeated multiple times

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Thus process tree should capture a loop after AE optional you can either exit to AD or execute missing info RMI and then validate form VF then loop back

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Specifically Sequence from RA to AE then loop then AD SC AC

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Case 1 fits pattern RMI then VF and case 2 fits direct move from AE to AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 shows two RMIs before VF so a simple mandatory single RMI VF body is not enough if zero occurrence must also be allowed

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: If we set loop A to sequence RMI VF and B to tau then loop would always execute RMI VF at least once because A is always executed That is not correct for case 2 where there is no missing info

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So we need a loop that can be executed zero times We can handle that by placing an XOR with tau before the loop or by making the whole loop optional

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus final tree can be Sequence RA VF AE XOR tau LOOP Sequence RMI VF tau AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This ensures zero or more repetitions of requesting missing info and re validation and preserves the main sequence ending with approval confirmation and archival
